notes: Two-leg XBR/XAG Brent-silver return-spread reversion basket from the approved MACROTRENDS-SILVER-OIL-RATIO-2026 source packet and Chan pair-spread implementation lineage. The EA runs from the XBRUSD.DWX host setfile and reads both D1 close series to compute log-return spread over a fixed lookback. Q02 must evaluate the logical basket, not the standalone legs.
